LatestInvoiceRecord.title: LatestInvoiceRecord
LatestInvoiceRecord.description: Holds all invoice details linked to the invoice record. Use Markdown formatting for display. Make the invoice name linkable to invoice id using markdown.

Output.title: Output
Output.description: Always include this in the response. Holds the Markdown-formatted PDF download link. Construct as: You can download the PDF here: [Download Invoice PDF](https://<org_domain>.my.salesforce.com/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/download/{ContentVersionId})
